com.pax.poslink.peripheries

Class POSLinkScanner

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.peripheries.POSLinkScanner

  • public class POSLinkScanner
extends java.lang.Object
    Control Scanner
    This API is specifically designed for Pax Android devices, such as the E500, A920, and others.
    Currently supported devices: E500, E600, E800, A920, A930, A80.
    This API supports the rear camera, front camera, and laser scanner.
    The API usage order is as follows:
    getPOSLinkScanner(Context, java.lang.String)
    open()
    start(IScanListener)
    close()

      A scan listener which will callback ScanResult

      void start(POSLinkScanner.ScannerListener listener)

      use start(IScanListener) instead, this method can only return scanned content without format

      Jump to scan Activity. You should open() first.

    • Method Detail

      • getPOSLinkScanner

        public static POSLinkScanner getPOSLinkScanner(Context context,
                                               java.lang.String scannerType)
        Get the POSLinkScanner. See POSLinkScanner.ScannerType
        Parameters:
        context - context
        scannerType - See POSLinkScanner.ScannerType
        Returns:
        The instance

      • open

        public ProcessResult open()
        Open scanner for initialization
        Returns:
        Result for open

      • start

        @Deprecated
public void start(POSLinkScanner.ScannerListener listener)
        Deprecated. use start(IScanListener) instead, this method can only return scanned content without format

        Jump to scan Activity. You should open() first.

        Parameters:
        listener - listen the scan result

      • start

        public void start(POSLinkScanner.IScanListener listener)
        Jump to scan Activity. You should open() first.
        Parameters:
        listener - see POSLinkScanner.IScanListener

      • close

        public ProcessResult close()
        close scanner
        Returns:
        Close result

      • getBarcodeMap

        public java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer> getBarcodeMap()
        Only supported if the ScannerType is POSLinkScanner.ScannerType.LASER

        Gets a list of supported coding systems.

        Return null if not supported.
        Returns:
        Map.key: ScanCodeFormat
        Map.value: 1:Open, 0:Close

      • setBarcodeMap

        public void setBarcodeMap(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Integer> map)
        Only supported if the ScannerType is POSLinkScanner.ScannerType.LASER

        Set the code system list.

        Parameters:
        map -
        Map.key: ScanCodeFormat
        Map.value: 1:Open, 0:Close

      • getScannerSettings

        public java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> getScannerSettings()
        Only supported if the ScannerType is POSLinkScanner.ScannerType.LASER

        Get the configuration of ScannerHw
        Return null if not supported.

        Returns:
        Setting options Key Value
        Shakevibrate "true":Open, "false":Close
        Sound sound "true":Open, "false":Close
        Scan Mode scan_mode "0":Normal: click once to scan
        "1":Continuous scan(automatic): click to scan continuously, and click again to stop
        "2":Continuous scan(manual): press and hold on to scan continuously and automatically, release to stop
        Scan Time Interval scan_time_interval "0":0.5s : delay 0.5s to continue scanning after read
        "1":1s : delay 1s to continue scanning after read
        "2":Custom: use time interval custom setting for the delay between scans
        Time Interval Custom time_interval_custom Used when scan_time_interval is set to 2
        Range: 0.0~30.0s

      • setScannerSettings

        public void setScannerSettings(java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> map)
        Only supported if the ScannerType is POSLinkScanner.ScannerType.LASER

        Set the configuration of ScannerHw

        Parameters:
        map -
        Setting options Key Value
        Shakevibrate "true":Open "false":Close
        Sound sound "true":Open "false":Close
        Scan Mode scan_mode "0":Normal: click once to scan
        "1":Continuous scan(automatic): click to scan continuously, and click again to stop
        "2":Continuous scan(manual): press and hold on to scan continuously and automatically, release to stop
        Scan Time Interval scan_time_interval "0":0.5s : delay 0.5s to continue scanning after read
        "1":1s : delay 1s to continue scanning after read
        "2":Custom: use time interval custom setting for the delay between scans
        Time Interval Custom time_interval_custom Used when scan_time_interval is set to 2
        Range: 0.0~30.0s

      • setScanResultMode

        public static boolean setScanResultMode(Context context,
                                        int mode)
        Set the shortcut key to scan the result processing mode.
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        mode -
        0:Type into the input box. (IScanCodec not supported).
        1: To send the broadcast, the system sends the broadcast in the following way:
        private static final String SEND_BROADCAST_ACTION = "com.barcode.sendBroadcast";
        Intent resultIntent = new Intent(SEND_BROADCAST_ACTION);
        resultIntent.putExtra("BARCODE", content);
        resultIntent.putExtra("CODE_FORMAT", format);
        sendBroadcast(resultIntent);
        2:Copy to the clipboard.
        Returns:
        Whether set successfully
